$comment: Controlled vocabulary mapping a termination condition (the measured quantity + the direction the limit is approached from) to the EMMO termination quantity class, attached under hasTerminationParameter. This replaces the old name-encoded scheme (e.g. 'discharging_cutoff_voltage' -> LowerVoltageLimit) with an explicit (quantity, direction) pair, mirroring bmgen's LOWER_LIMITS/UPPER_LIMITS remap. 'below'/'above' = the value is a lower/upper bound the channel crosses to end the step. 'duration' is time-based and direction-free.
